showcase.app.title: SeedGrid Components Showcase
showcase.app.subtitle: Components Showcase
showcase.home.title: SeedGrid Components
showcase.home.description: Interactive catalog of all components in {pkg}. Click any component to see interactive examples and prop docs.
showcase.home.about.title: About
showcase.home.about.p1: SG components wrap React Hook Form. When you provide {name} and {control}, the component applies {controller} internally.
showcase.home.about.li1: Less boilerplate: no need to write Controller for each field.
showcase.home.about.li2: Validation and default messages are built in.
showcase.home.about.li4: Easier to reuse layouts and rules across screens.
showcase.home.about.p2: You can still use the component without RHF (as a controlled input), but with {name} and {control} it becomes an RHF wrapper.
showcase.home.install.title: Install
showcase.home.i18n.title: Language (i18n)
showcase.home.i18n.p1: Components use pt-BR by default and are ready for other languages via i18n. Keys follow the {namespace} namespace.
showcase.home.i18n.p2: To change the global language, wrap your app with the package provider:
showcase.home.i18n.p3: If you are not using React at the config point (or want a simple global setup), use:

showcase.component.cnpj.i18nNote: Default messages come from the package i18n (components.*).

showcase.component.cpfcnpj.subtitle: Single input for CPF or CNPJ with dynamic mask and validation.
showcase.component.cpfcnpj.i18nNote: Default messages come from the package i18n (components.*).

showcase.component.inputNumber.subtitle: Numeric input with thousand grouping, locale decimal separator, and decimal precision control.
Example integrated with React Hook Form using register (uncontrolled).
Use when you need watch (real-time value) + external setValue.
Validation function returns an error message or null.
Icon positioned to the left of the input.
iconButtons receives an array of ReactNode.
100% standalone example with defaults on load and Save button.
Example without RHF with onEnter, onExit, onChange, onClear, onValidation.

showcase.component.inputEmail.title: SgInputEmail
showcase.component.inputEmail.subtitle: Email input with built-in validation, customizable messages, and extra icon support.
showcase.component.inputEmail.sections.r: Validates empty state and shows a custom message.
showcase.component.inputEmail.sections.v: Validation function returns an error message or null.
showcase.component.inputEmail.sections.j: The host app can load a JSON and add domains at runtime.
showcase.component.inputText.title: SgInputText
showcase.component.inputText.subtitle: Base text input component. All other specialized inputs (CPF, Email, Password, etc.) are built on top of it via composition.
showcase.component.inputText.sections.ba: Example integrated with React Hook Form using register (uncontrolled).
showcase.component.inputText.sections.co: This example needs to be controlled because it uses watch (real-time value in render) and external setValue. Otherwise, prefer register (uncontrolled).
Uses maxLength and showCharCounter to limit and display count.
showcase.component.inputText.sections.mi: Validates that the text has a minimum length on blur.
showcase.component.inputText.sections.va: Validation function returns an error message or null.
showcase.component.inputText.sections.pr: Icon positioned on the left of the input.
Prefix/suffix are visual only. The returned value is already concatenated.
showcase.component.inputText.sections.ic: iconButtons receives an array of ReactNode. Each element is a button with onClick you control.
showcase.component.inputText.sections.ex: The error prop shows a message coming from the parent (server-side, etc).
showcase.component.inputText.sections.st: 100% standalone example with defaults on load and a save button.
showcase.component.inputText.sections.ev: Only example without RHF: onEnter, onExit, onChange, onClear, onValidation.
showcase.component.inputText.labels.icon: Type something and click the icons...
showcase.component.inputText.labels.name: Name
showcase.component.inputText.bullets.con: control connects the input to RHF state
setValue updates the state when you need to change it from outside
To set from outside: just call setValue("new text")
To clear from outside: just call setValue("")
showcase.component.inputText.bullets.ico: Each array item is a normal <button> with onClick
You control the action: copy, open modal, call API, etc.
The component only renders the buttons in the suffix, next to the clear X
showcase.component.inputText.props.title: Props Reference
Required. Input ID and label association.
Fixed text before the value (visual + concatenated into the value).
Fixed text after the value (visual + concatenated into the value).
Native props forwarded to the input.
Icon on the left of the input.
Extra buttons in the suffix area.
Called with string value on each change.
Called when clicking the clear button.
showcase.component.inputTextArea.title: SgInputTextArea
showcase.component.inputTextArea.subtitl: Multi-line textarea with floating label, character/word/line counters and integrated validation. Same SgInputText API adapted for textarea.
showcase.component.inputTextArea.section: Textarea with floating label and clear button (default).
To control the value from outside (set, clear, fill via API), use textareaProps.value + textareaProps.onChange. State lives in the parent.
Uses maxLength and showCharCounter to limit and display count.
Validates that the text has a minimum length on blur.
Validates a minimum number of lines (line breaks). TextArea-only.
Validation function returns an error message or null.
height controls container height. maxLines defines the textarea rows attribute.
Icon positioned in the upper-left corner of the textarea.
enabled=false disables, readOnly prevents editing via textareaProps.
The error prop shows a message coming from the parent (server-side, etc).
showcase.component.inputTextArea.bullets: textareaProps.value binds the textarea to your state
textareaProps.onChange updates state when the user types
To set externally: call setValue("new text")
Text filled via API.
Second line.
showcase.component.inputTextArea.props.r: Required. Textarea ID and label association.
Native props forwarded to the textarea.
Called with string value on each change.
Called when the textarea receives focus.
Called when the textarea loses focus.
Called when clicking the clear button.

showcase.component.inputPassword.subtitl: Password input with visibility toggle, custom validation, clear button and counter.
showcase.component.inputPassword.section: Password with label, hint and visibility toggle.
Validates empty state and shows a custom message.

showcase.component.inputPassword.message: Password must be at least 8 characters.

showcase.component.inputPostalCode.title: SgInputPostalCode

showcase.component.wizard.title: SgWizard

validateStep runs AFTER the automatic input validation.
Use it for business rules beyond field validation.

showcase.component.fab.title: SgFloatActionButton
showcase.component.fab.subtitle: Floating action button (FAB) with fixed positioning, tooltips, animations and expandable action menu.
